# Cross-Dataset Generalization Fixtures

These synthetic fixtures cover only decision-bearing fields from the observed
ContinueGCD/GCD/DomainGCD failure patterns. They do not copy private datasets,
checkpoints, logs, or live project authorities.

- shared transfer modes freeze one human-selected setting;
- formula-derived raw values may differ only for normalized/calibrated modes;
- calibration is committed to the idea ledger before the executable profile is projected;
- a batch materializes every preregistered dataset/value probe row;
- incomplete value coverage cannot be promoted to a mechanism-level negative.
